mission_anchor: Fully implement `pi-code-index` across all explicitly documented project phases available in the repository, starting from the normative Phase 1 MVP and continuing through any additional concrete phase specs, while preserving the documented architecture of a thin pi extension backed by a local daemon.
goal: Expose and wire the approved Phase 1 query tools with deterministic results, freshness and coverage metadata, and shipped docs plus test parity for the local-only extension and daemon architecture.
acceptance_criteria: The extension registers only the approved Phase 1 tools `symbol_lookup`, `file_summary`, and `impact_analysis`, and activates them only when cwd is inside an enabled, healthy git repo.

Daemon query methods `symbolLookup`, `fileSummary`, and `impactAnalysis` return the required Phase 1 fields, deterministic ordering, documented caps and truncation metadata, plus `freshness`, `coverage`, `provenance`, and `analysisQuality` metadata.

TS/JS structural results and fallback basic results are both surfaced through the tool APIs without exposing RFC-only tools or advanced retrieval features such as `smart_read`, `codebase_search`, embeddings, or shared-baseline behavior.

README and deterministic tests describe and verify the shipped command and tool behavior, local-only daemon architecture, and operator recovery path through `/index doctor`, `/index reindex`, and `/index disable`.
why_now: The tool surface and shipped docs depend on the earlier slices producing real indexed data, operational repo states, and a truthful daemon boundary.
locked_notes: Do not add `smart_read`, `codebase_search`, embeddings, shared-baseline reuse, or other RFC-only post-MVP features.
evidence: `src/shared/protocol.ts`, `src/extension/daemon-client.ts`, and `src/daemon/server.ts` now expose only the approved Phase 1 query methods `symbolLookup`, `fileSummary`, and `impactAnalysis` with deterministic caps, truncation metadata, freshness, coverage, provenance, and analysis-quality signaling.

`src/extension/index.ts` now registers only `symbol_lookup`, `file_summary`, and `impact_analysis`, and gates their activation to enabled healthy Git repos via daemon-backed status checks before agent start.

`tests/tools-parity.test.ts` and `tests/check.ts` deterministically verify tool registration, activation gating, structural and fallback query surfacing, documented caps, and operator-facing formatting; `README.md` now documents the shipped local-only daemon architecture and `/index doctor` / `/index reindex` / `/index disable` recovery path.
Commit b7fe5c9eaa8d8194011555960e7a86b1743526f5 passed deterministic verification via `npm run check` and `npm test`.
